bio: Maintains the 49 Fluid 5 components and the automated template audit that keeps every Desiderio release free of inline styles and hardcoded colors. Twelve years of TYPO3 work, two open-source maintainerships — and one of the people who personally answers your Pro support tickets.

avatar.title: Dr. Lena Hoffmann
